title: Apple Skins
description: Challenge yourself in your Create mod factories with the Apple Skins mod, and automate things you never thought possible!
body:
[![Scaturigo Hosting Link](https://i.imgur.com/44k2Z6X.png)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ)

# Apple Skins
Apple Skins is the ultimate apple mod for Minecraft. It adds many apple-themed items and features, all integrating perfectly with Create! And not only that, it makes the game slightly harder, isn't that neat?


![Apple Skins In Text](https://i.imgur.com/g9lhaMJ.png)

# Content
The Apple Skins Mod adds a lot of content! Here are just some of the things you can expect from the Apple Skins Mod!

- **The Apple Bar**! The mod's main feature! Deplete it, and bad things will happen. Fill it, and good things will happen!

![The Apple Bar Looking All Cool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af2cc605a6012b666655a8d13ad3158dde265e5d.png)

- **Apple Trees**! Woooooo!! Trees with apples in them!!!

![An image of a tree with apples in it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db3ff46798366b2115b80296155af40460719880_0.webp)

- **Music**! Beautiful music, created by the most talented musician!

![A deep fried jukebox dance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/172f36646a0bb8244d05f14a69a44df4220d6b0a.gif)

- **A Bowl Of Water**! Mmmmmm, tasty!!

![Someone drinking a tasty yummy bowl of water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bf89705b4c85c617f8c19e4d3501d3862b5a57c_0.webp)

- **Abstract Art**! Beautiful and pretty!!

![Incredibly abstract art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1be2061711beb5271e24997b549f3a92c0b3b684.png)

- **Full Create Integration**! Automate your apples! Make something else make you apples!

![A Create machine cutting apples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c374e08846495d06059a54e0b55fde547525d34.gif)

- **And So Much More**! Like so much more you could could spend time on it!

# It's A Cool Mod, Isn't it?

Like it's awesome and cool and definitely in your top 2, right? Like real high up there, so much higher than the other mods. Like name another mod that's this good, I'll wait. 
Oh, you can't? See, that's why this one is the best one.

You downloading it yet?

Come on, please do it...

Will you?

If so, that would be poggies.
